guidance.wrapperRole: Nicaraguan wrapper gives cocoa, coffee, dark sweetness, and puro identity.
guidance.binderRole: Nicaraguan binder reinforces burn, structure, and regional continuity.
guidance.fillerRole: Nicaraguan filler drives the rich Padron profile: cocoa, coffee, earth, and medium-full strength.
guidance.avoidIf: Beginner, budget-sensitive user, short time window, or user wants mild cream.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the user explicitly wants the 2025 Cigar of the Year or elite Nicaraguan collector status.
guidance.memberBlurb: 2025 Cigar of the Year — Padron anniversary perfecto with malted milk, cafe au lait, and chocolate in a Nicaraguan puro. Collector occasion.

guidance.wrapperRole: Dominican wrapper is the core achievement, adding spice, sweetness, and estate-grown rarity.
guidance.binderRole: Dominican binder keeps the puro structure elegant and Fuente-like.
guidance.fillerRole: Dominican filler provides cedar, spice, fruit, and OpusX complexity.
